channel.title: Nonlinear Beta Tests Results on Weiguang Liu
channel.description: Recent content in Nonlinear Beta Tests Results on Weiguang Liu

item.title: Individual Stock Return Full Sample
item.description: Individual Stock Return Full Sample Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 2017-12-29 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 1976-07-30 00:00:00-2017-12-29 00:00:00 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 463) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear? MktRf 2.144 -1.474 1.778 * HML 2.126 -1.422 1.363 * SMB -0.185 -1.489 1.566 nxf -0.

item.title: Individual Stock Return Sub-sample
item.description: Individual Stock Return Sub-sample Cross Sectional Regression has intercept: 1 Bootstrap Iterations: 1000 Estimating Beta With: 1976-07-30 to 1999-12-31 Estimating Average Excess Return with: 2000-01-31 00:00:00-2017-12-29 00:00:00 Return Dimension TxN: (498, 463) Model Tn Left CV Right CV Is Nonlinear?
